scripts.dev: concurrently -n vite,tauri -c cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd src-tauri && npx @tauri-apps/cli dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n sidecar,vite,tauri -c yellow,cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "python -m src.api.server" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd src-tauri && npx @tauri-apps/cli dev"
